rationale: Vivid, engaging profile writing with strong concrete details, scene-setting, and a clear sense of the custodian’s role. Flow is smooth and the voice feels human. Main weakness is over-written phrasing and heavy metaphor (“cathedral of echoes,” “geological constant”), which hurts simplicity and economy. The excerpt also appears to end abruptly.
